data.content: Planning complete. Root cause is the current scan fallback and UI toggle design: Claude, Codex, and Gemini currently degrade to provider-only option rows when dynamic discovery is unavailable, and the scanned selection callback chain only adds missing options, so an existing selection cannot be cleared. Recommended implementation is to add static provider catalogs for those three providers in the scan/import path, merge them with detected configured-model metadata, and add an explicit remove path from scanned selected pills or row controls through SettingsAgentsSection and useAgentMutations to removeAgent. Tests should cover multi-row pulldowns, actual model labels in pills including Claude Opus 4.6, and clearing previously selected scanned models back to an unselected state.
